name: WorkWave-Mobile-AI-Tools
description: WorkWave mobile AI tools and plugins

plugins.name: mobile-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end mobile development workflow for iOS and Android. Skills: mobile-ui-builder (generate + validate storyboards/layouts, landscape safety, scroll view constraints), code-convention, code-review. Commands: pre-implementation (Jira grooming), implement (spec, TDD, refactor, standards/adversarial checks), testing (test, coverage, fixture, debug, analyze), post-implementation (design-doc, PR).

plugins.name: ww-mobile-ai-test-agent
plugins.description: Automated QA testing agent for WorkWave mobile apps (PestPac, RealGreen, WinTeam, RouteManager). Ticket-driven tests, POM generation, workflow test automation, and regression testing on Android and iOS.
